hooks.command:
export PATH=/root/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH; cd billingonaire_backend && black_out=$(black . 2>&1); isort_out=$(isort . 2>&1); flake8_out=$(flake8 . 2>&1 | head -40); fmt_msg=''; reformatted=$(echo "$black_out" | grep 'reformatted' || true); [ -n "$reformatted" ] && fmt_msg+="black: $reformatted
"; isort_fixed=$(echo "$isort_out" | grep -v '^$' | grep -v 'Skipped' || true); [ -n "$isort_fixed" ] && fmt_msg+="isort: $isort_fixed
"; if [ -n "$flake8_out" ]; then msg="⚠️  Flake8 issues (fix before pushing):
$flake8_out"; [ -n "$fmt_msg" ] && msg="🔧 Auto-formatted:
${fmt_msg}
$msg"; elif [ -n "$fmt_msg" ]; then msg="🔧 Auto-formatted (commit the changes):
${fmt_msg}
✅ Flake8 clean"; else msg="✅ black, isort, flake8: all clean"; fi; echo '{}' | jq --arg m "$msg" '{systemMessage: $m}'
